languages.text: "Войска рода Гапрак, отправленные на помощь династии, — что ты о них знаешь?"
languages.translation_comment: играет DL_KnowGaprakPass и не играет DL_GaprakMask
играет DL_KnowGaprakPass и не играет DL_GaprakMask

languages.text: "The troops of House Gaprak sent to help the dynasty — what can you tell me about them?"
languages.original_text: "Войска рода Гапрак, отправленные на помощь династии, — что ты о них знаешь?"

traits.locale_text: "The troops of House Gaprak sent to help the dynasty — what can you tell me about them?"
"The troops of House Gaprak sent to help the dynasty — what can you tell me about them?"
"The troops of House Gaprak sent to help the dynasty — what can you tell me about them?"

languages.text: «¿Puede hablarme sobre las tropas que envió la casa Gaprak como apoyo para la dinastía?».
languages.original_text: "The troops of House Gaprak sent to help the dynasty — what can you tell me about them?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Puede hablarme sobre las tropas que envió la casa Gaprak como apoyo para la dinastía?».

languages.text: “贾帕克家族派来支援王朝的部队——关于他们你都知道些什么？”
languages.original_text: "The troops of House Gaprak sent to help the dynasty — what can you tell me about them?"

traits.locale_text: “贾帕克家族派来支援王朝的部队——关于他们你都知道些什么？”

languages.text: « Les troupes que la maison Gaprak a envoyées au secours de la dynastie, que pouvez-vous me dire à leur sujet ? »
languages.original_text: "The troops of House Gaprak sent to help the dynasty — what can you tell me about them?"

traits.locale_text: « Les troupes que la maison Gaprak a envoyées au secours de la dynastie, que pouvez-vous me dire à leur sujet ? »

languages.text: "Hanedanlığa yardım etmek için gönderilen Gaprak Hanesi birlikleri... Onlar hakkında bana ne söyleyebilirsin?"
languages.original_text: "The troops of House Gaprak sent to help the dynasty — what can you tell me about them?"

traits.locale_text: "Hanedanlığa yardım etmek için gönderilen Gaprak Hanesi birlikleri... Onlar hakkında bana ne söyleyebilirsin?"

languages.text: "Die Truppen von Haus Gaprak, die entsandt wurden, um der Dynastie zu helfen — was wisst Ihr über sie?"
languages.original_text: "The troops of House Gaprak sent to help the dynasty — what can you tell me about them?"

traits.locale_text: "Die Truppen von Haus Gaprak, die entsandt wurden, um der Dynastie zu helfen — was wisst Ihr über sie?"

languages.text: 「ガプラク家の軍勢が王朝を助けるために派遣されたと聞いていますが、その軍勢について何かお話しいただけますか？」
languages.original_text: "The troops of House Gaprak sent to help the dynasty — what can you tell me about them?"

traits.locale_text: 「ガプラク家の軍勢が王朝を助けるために派遣されたと聞いていますが、その軍勢について何かお話しいただけますか？」
